title: Try an Example for the dateFacet Type

sections.heading: Step 1: Retrieve your Service Account access token for the project.
sections.body:
Use your service account to generate an access token, which
authenticates your requests to the Atlas Administration API.
To learn how to generate an access token, see
[Make an API (Application Programming Interface) Request](example-api-request).

sections.heading: Step 3: Create a  index.
sections.body:
Run the [atlas clusters search indexes create](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-search-indexes-create)
command in your terminal, replacing `<clusterName>` with the
name of the cluster, and `<path-to-file>` with the
path to the `search-index.json` file:

```shell
atlas clusters search indexes create --clusterName <cluster-name> --file <path-to-file>

```

The MongoDB Search `document` type takes the following parameters:

| Option                        | Type              | Necessity | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Default |
| ----------------------------- | ----------------- | --------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- |
| type                          | string            | Required  | Human-readable label that identifies the field type. Value must be document.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |         |
| dynamic                       | boolean or object | Optional  | Flag that indicates whether MongoDB Search recursively indexes all fields and nested documents or object that references the name of the field type definition that contains the field types to index.Value must be one of the following:boolean - set to true to recursively index all indexable field types or set to false to not dynamically index any of the dynamically indexable field types. For the list of field types that MongoDB Search dynamically indexes using the default type set, see Enable Default typeSet.object - specify the name typeSets that contains the list of field types to index. To learn more, see dynamic.typeSet.If you set this to false, you must specify individual fields to index using fields object. You can also configure individual fields to index separately using the fields object.IMPORTANT: MongoDB Search automatically indexes all dynamically indexable field types in a document. MongoDB Search also recursively indexes all nested documents under the document, unless you explicitly override by setting dynamic to false. You can also configure dynamic indexing to only index specified field types using typeSets. | false   |
| dynamic.typeSet               | string            | Optional  | Name of the typeSet array of objects that configures the field types to index. To learn more, see Configure a typeSet.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |         |
| fields                        | document          | Optional  | Document that maps field names to field definitions. To learn more, see an example. This is required if dynamic is omitted or set to false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |         |
| typeSets                      | array of objects  | Optional  | Field types to index automatically using dynamic mappings. To learn about the field types that you can configure for dynamic mappings, see Configure a typeSet.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |         |
| typeSets.\[n].name            | string            | Required  | Human-readable label that identifies the configuration for the fields types to dynamically index.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |         |
| typeSets.\[n].types           | array of objects  | Required  | Field types, one per object, to index automatically using dynamic mappings.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |         |
| typeSets.\[n].types.\[n].type | string            | Required  | Field type to automatically index. You can also configure the settings for each field type. If you don't configure any settings, MongoDB Search uses the default values for the field type. To learn more about the field types that you can configure for dynamic mapping, see Configure a typeSet.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |         |

The following index definition examples use collections in the
[sample data sets](available-sample-datasets). After you
[Load Sample Data Into Atlas](load-sample-data), you can use
these examples to index fields as the dateFacet type.

To learn how to set up and run the following example code, see
Define the Index for the token Type.

The following index definition for the `sample_mflix.movies` collection
indexes the `awards` field as the `document` type. It also configures
MongoDB Search to automatically index all the dynamically indexable fields inside the
`awards` object.

```json
{
  "name": "default",
  "collectionName": "movies",
  "database": "sample_mflix",
  "mappings": {
    "dynamic": false,
    "fields": {
      "awards": {
        "type": "document",
        "dynamic": true
      }
    }
  }
}
```

The following index definition for the `sample_mflix.movies` collection
indexes the `awards` field as the `document` type. It references
the `typeSet` name, `onlyNumbers`. The field type definition
named `onlyNumbers` enables automatic indexing for only fields of
type `number` in the `awards` document.

```json
{
  "name": "default",
  "collectionName": "movies",
  "database": "sample_mflix",
  "mappings": {
    "dynamic": false,
    "fields": {
      "awards": {
        "type": "document",
        "dynamic": {
          "typeSet": "onlyNumbers"
        }
      }
   }
  },
  "typeSets": [
    {
      "name": "onlyNumbers",
      "types": [
        {
          "type": "number"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

You can use the MongoDB Search `document` type to index fields in objects or
documents.

If you enable [dynamic mappings](static-dynamic-mappings), MongoDB Search
automatically indexes all dynamically indexable fields types
in a `document` type field. Alternatively, you can configure dynamic
mappings to index only specific field types nested in a `document`
type field.

You can use the **Visual Editor** or the  **JSON Editor** in the
Atlas UI, Atlas CLI, Atlas Administration API, [mongosh](mongodb-shell),
MongoDB Compass, or MongoDB drivers to index fields as the dateFacet
type.

You can't use the MongoDB Search `document` type to index fields in objects
or documents that are inside an array. Instead, use the MongoDB Search
[embeddedDocuments](bson-data-types-embedded-documents) type to
index fields in objects or documents that are elements of an array.

sections.heading: Step 3: Run the  method to create the index.
Index Dynamically Using Default typeSet
sections.body:
The following index definition for the `sample_mflix.movies` collection
indexes the `awards` field as the `document` type. It also configures
MongoDB Search to automatically index all the dynamically indexable fields inside the
`awards` object.

Visual Editor

- In the Add Field Mapping window, select
  awards from the Field Name
  dropdown.

- Click the Data Type dropdown and select
  Document.

- Modify the Document Properties to set the value for
  Dynamic to `true`.

- Click Add.

JSON Editor

Replace the default index definition with the following
definition:

```json
{
   "mappings": {
      "dynamic": false,
      "fields": {
         "awards": {
            "type": "document",
            "dynamic": true
         }
      }
   }
}
```

sections.heading: Index Dynamically Using Configured typeSet
Step 1: Set up the C project.
sections.body:
In your terminal, navigate to where you want to create your application,
then run the following command to create a directory called
`atlas-search-project` for this project:

```shell
# Create a new directory for the project
mkdir atlas-search-project && cd atlas-search-project
```

Add the C driver to your project by following the instructions in the
[MongoDB C Driver documentation](languages/c/c-driver/current/get-started).

codeBlocks.content:
# Create a new directory for the project
mkdir atlas-search-project && cd atlas-search-project

sections.heading: Step 2: Define the index.
Step 3: Set up a CMake application
sections.body:
To configure your application, create a `CMakeLists.txt` file in
your project directory. Then, add the following code to the file:

```txt
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.11)
project(atlas-search-index LANGUAGES C)
add_executable (index.out create_index.c)
find_package(mongoc <version> REQUIRED)
target_link_libraries(index.out mongoc::mongoc)

```

The preceding code performs the following actions:

- Configures a C project.

- Creates a `index.out` executable for your application.

- Finds and requires the C driver. Replace the `<version>`
  placeholder with your C driver version, such as `2.0.0`.

- Links the program to the `libmongoc` library.

> **Note:** In the sample `CMakeLists.txt` file, the `mongoc::mongoc` target
> points to either the static library or the shared library.
> The library type depends on which one is available and
> whichever type the user specifies in the `MONGOC_DEFAULT_IMPORTED_LIBRARY_TYPE`
> CMake configuration setting. If you don't set this value and
> both library types are available, `mongoc::mongoc` uses
> the static library.
>
> You can use the `mongoc::static` target to explicitly use the
> static library or the `mongoc::shared` target to use the shared
> library.

codeBlocks.content:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.11)
project(atlas-search-index LANGUAGES C)
add_executable (index.out create_index.c)
find_package(mongoc <version> REQUIRED)
target_link_libraries(index.out mongoc::mongoc)

sections.heading: Step 4: Create the index.
sections.body:
In your terminal, run the following commands to build and run this
application:

**Input:**

```shell
cmake -S. -Bcmake-build
cmake --build cmake-build --target index.out
./cmake-build/index.out
```

**Output:**

```
Index created!
```

**Input:**

```shell

./app.out
```

```
New index name: default
```

> **Tip:** 
>
> MacOS Error
>
> MacOS users might see the following error after running the preceding
> commands:
>
> ```sh
> dyld[54430]: Library not loaded: @rpath/libmongocxx._noabi.dylib
> ```
>
> To resolve this error, use the `-Wl`,\`\`-rpath\`\` linker option to set
> the `@rpath`, as shown in the following code:
>
> ```sh
> c++ --std=c++17 CreateIndex.cpp -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/ $(pkg-config --cflags --libs libmongocxx) -o ./app.out
> ./app.out
> ```

Step 1: Set up your Java project with the MongoDB Java driver.
sections.body:
In your IDE, create a new [Maven](https://maven.apache.org/) or
[Gradle](https://gradle.org/) project. Add the Bill of
Materials (BOM) for MongoDB JVM artifacts to your project to
organize dependency versions. The BOM simplifies dependency
management by ensuring that you maintain consistent and compatible
versions of dependencies, such as between the Java driver and
the core driver library. Use the BOM to avoid version conflicts
and simplify upgrades.

Select from the following **Maven** and **Gradle** tabs
to view instructions for adding the BOM for each dependency manager:

Maven

Add the following code to the `dependencyManagement` list in your
`pom.xml` file:

```xml
<dependencyManagement>
    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.mongodb</groupId>
            <artifactId>mongodb-driver-bom</artifactId>
            <version>5.5.1</version>
            <type>pom</type>
            <scope>import</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>
</dependencyManagement>
```

Gradle

Add the following code to dependencies list in your
`build.gradle` file:

```groovy
dependencies {
    implementation(platform("org.mongodb:mongodb-driver-bom:5.5.1"))
}
```

To view a list of dependencies that the BOM manages, see
the [mongodb-driver-bom dependency listing](https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.mongodb/mongodb-driver-bom/5.51)
on the Maven Repository website.

After adding the BOM, select from the following **Maven** and **Gradle** tabs to view
instructions for adding the MongoDB Java Sync Driver as a dependency
in your project:

Maven

Add the following code to the `dependencies` array in your Maven
project's `pom.xml` file:

```xml
<dependencies>
    <dependency>    
      <groupId>org.mongodb</groupId>    
      <artifactId>mongodb-driver-sync</artifactId>    
      <version>4.11.1</version>    
    </dependency>
</dependencies>

```

Gradle

Add the following to the `dependencies` array in your Gradle
project's `build.gradle` file:

```json
dependencies {
   // MongoDB Java Sync Driver v4.11.0 or later
   implementation 'org.mongodb:mongodb-driver-sync'
}

```

Run your package manager to install the dependencies to your project.

For more detailed installation instructions and version compatibility, see
the [MongoDB Java Driver documentation](java/sync/current/get-started).

sections.heading: Index Dynamically Using Default typeSet
sections.body:
The following index definition for the `sample_mflix.movies` collection
indexes the `awards` field as the `document` type. It also configures
MongoDB Search to automatically index all the dynamically indexable fields inside the
`awards` object.

```python
from pymongo import MongoClient
from pymongo.operations import SearchIndexModel

# Connect to your Atlas deployment
uri = "<connection-string>"
client = MongoClient(uri)

database = client["sample_mflix"]
collection = database["movies"]

# Create the MongoDB Search index definition for the document field
search_index_model = SearchIndexModel(
    definition={
        "mappings": {
            "dynamic": false,
            "fields": {
                "awards": {
                   "type": "document",
                   "dynamic": true
                }
            }
        },
    },
    name="default",
)

# Create the index
result = collection.create_search_index(model=search_index_model)
print(f"New index name: {result}")
```

sections.heading: Index Dynamically Using Configured typeSet
sections.body:
The following index definition for the `sample_mflix.movies` collection
indexes the `awards` field as the `document` type. It references
the `typeSet` name, `onlyNumbers`. The field type definition
named `onlyNumbers` enables automatic indexing for only fields of
type `number` in the `awards` document.

```python
from pymongo import MongoClient
from pymongo.operations import SearchIndexModel

# Connect to your Atlas deployment
uri = "<connection-string>"
client = MongoClient(uri)

database = client["sample_mflix"]
collection = database["movies"]

# Create the Atlas Search index definition for the document field
search_index_model = SearchIndexModel(
    definition={
      "mappings": {
        "dynamic": false,
        "fields": {
          "awards": {
            "type": "document",
            "dynamic": {
              "typeSet": "onlyNumbers"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      "typeSets": [
        {
          "name": "onlyNumbers",
          "types": [
            {
              "type": "number"
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    name="default",
)

# Create the index
result = collection.create_search_index(model=search_index_model)
print(f"New index name: {result}")
```

You can use the MongoDB Search `document` type to index fields in objects or
documents.

If you enable [dynamic mappings](static-dynamic-mappings), MongoDB Search
automatically indexes all dynamically indexable fields types
in a `document` type field. Alternatively, you can configure dynamic
mappings to index only specific field types nested in a `document`
type field.

You can use the **Visual Editor** or the  **JSON Editor** in the
Atlas UI, Atlas CLI, Atlas Administration API, [mongosh](mongodb-shell),
MongoDB Compass, or MongoDB drivers to index fields as the dateFacet
type.

You can't use the MongoDB Search `document` type to index fields in objects
or documents that are inside an array. Instead, use the MongoDB Search
[embeddedDocuments](bson-data-types-embedded-documents) type to
index fields in objects or documents that are elements of an array.

sections.heading: Step 2: Define the index.
Step 3: Set up a CMake application
sections.body:
To configure your application, create a `CMakeLists.txt` file in
your project directory. Then, add the following code to the file:

```txt
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.11)
project(atlas-search-index LANGUAGES C)
add_executable (index.out create_index.c)
find_package(mongoc <version> REQUIRED)
target_link_libraries(index.out mongoc::mongoc)

```

The preceding code performs the following actions:

- Configures a C project.

- Creates a `index.out` executable for your application.

- Finds and requires the C driver. Replace the `<version>`
  placeholder with your C driver version, such as `2.0.0`.

- Links the program to the `libmongoc` library.

> **Note:** In the sample `CMakeLists.txt` file, the `mongoc::mongoc` target
> points to either the static library or the shared library.
> The library type depends on which one is available and
> whichever type the user specifies in the `MONGOC_DEFAULT_IMPORTED_LIBRARY_TYPE`
> CMake configuration setting. If you don't set this value and
> both library types are available, `mongoc::mongoc` uses
> the static library.
>
> You can use the `mongoc::static` target to explicitly use the
> static library or the `mongoc::shared` target to use the shared
> library.

codeBlocks.content:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.11)
project(atlas-search-index LANGUAGES C)
add_executable (index.out create_index.c)
find_package(mongoc <version> REQUIRED)
target_link_libraries(index.out mongoc::mongoc)

The MongoDB Search `document` type takes the following parameters:

| Option                        | Type              | Necessity | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Default |
| ----------------------------- | ----------------- | --------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- |
| type                          | string            | Required  | Human-readable label that identifies the field type. Value must be document.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |         |
| dynamic                       | boolean or object | Optional  | Flag that indicates whether MongoDB Search recursively indexes all fields and nested documents or object that references the name of the field type definition that contains the field types to index.Value must be one of the following:boolean - set to true to recursively index all indexable field types or set to false to not dynamically index any of the dynamically indexable field types. For the list of field types that MongoDB Search dynamically indexes using the default type set, see Enable Default typeSet.object - specify the name typeSets that contains the list of field types to index. To learn more, see dynamic.typeSet.If you set this to false, you must specify individual fields to index using fields object. You can also configure individual fields to index separately using the fields object.IMPORTANT: MongoDB Search automatically indexes all dynamically indexable field types in a document. MongoDB Search also recursively indexes all nested documents under the document, unless you explicitly override by setting dynamic to false. You can also configure dynamic indexing to only index specified field types using typeSets. | false   |
| dynamic.typeSet               | string            | Optional  | Name of the typeSet array of objects that configures the field types to index. To learn more, see Configure a typeSet.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |         |
| fields                        | document          | Optional  | Document that maps field names to field definitions. To learn more, see an example. This is required if dynamic is omitted or set to false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |         |
| typeSets                      | array of objects  | Optional  | Field types to index automatically using dynamic mappings. To learn about the field types that you can configure for dynamic mappings, see Configure a typeSet.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |         |
| typeSets.\[n].name            | string            | Required  | Human-readable label that identifies the configuration for the fields types to dynamically index.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |         |
| typeSets.\[n].types           | array of objects  | Required  | Field types, one per object, to index automatically using dynamic mappings.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |         |
| typeSets.\[n].types.\[n].type | string            | Required  | Field type to automatically index. You can also configure the settings for each field type. If you don't configure any settings, MongoDB Search uses the default values for the field type. To learn more about the field types that you can configure for dynamic mapping, see Configure a typeSet.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |         |

Step 1: Set up your Java project with the MongoDB Java driver.
sections.body:
In your IDE, create a new [Maven](https://maven.apache.org/) or
[Gradle](https://gradle.org/) project. Add the Bill of
Materials (BOM) for MongoDB JVM artifacts to your project to
organize dependency versions. The BOM simplifies dependency
management by ensuring that you maintain consistent and compatible
versions of dependencies, such as between the Java driver and
the core driver library. Use the BOM to avoid version conflicts
and simplify upgrades.

Select from the following **Maven** and **Gradle** tabs
to view instructions for adding the BOM for each dependency manager:

Maven

Add the following code to the `dependencyManagement` list in your
`pom.xml` file:

```xml
<dependencyManagement>
    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.mongodb</groupId>
            <artifactId>mongodb-driver-bom</artifactId>
            <version>5.5.1</version>
            <type>pom</type>
            <scope>import</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>
</dependencyManagement>
```

Gradle

Add the following code to dependencies list in your
`build.gradle` file:

```groovy
dependencies {
    implementation(platform("org.mongodb:mongodb-driver-bom:5.5.1"))
}
```

To view a list of dependencies that the BOM manages, see
the [mongodb-driver-bom dependency listing](https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.mongodb/mongodb-driver-bom/5.51)
on the Maven Repository website.

After adding the BOM, select from the following **Maven** and **Gradle** tabs to view
instructions for adding the MongoDB Java Sync Driver as a dependency
in your project:

Maven

Add the following code to the `dependencies` array in your Maven
project's `pom.xml` file:

```xml
<dependencies>
    <dependency>    
      <groupId>org.mongodb</groupId>    
      <artifactId>mongodb-driver-sync</artifactId>    
      <version>4.11.1</version>    
    </dependency>
</dependencies>

```

Gradle

Add the following to the `dependencies` array in your Gradle
project's `build.gradle` file:

```json
dependencies {
   // MongoDB Java Sync Driver v4.11.0 or later
   implementation 'org.mongodb:mongodb-driver-sync'
}

```

Run your package manager to install the dependencies to your project.

For more detailed installation instructions and version compatibility, see
the [MongoDB Java Driver documentation](java/sync/current/get-started).

sections.body:
**Input:**

```shell

```

**Output:**

```
New index name: default
```

The MongoDB Search `document` type takes the following parameters:

| Option                        | Type              | Necessity | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Default |
| ----------------------------- | ----------------- | --------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- |
| type                          | string            | Required  | Human-readable label that identifies the field type. Value must be document.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |         |
| dynamic                       | boolean or object | Optional  | Flag that indicates whether MongoDB Search recursively indexes all fields and nested documents or object that references the name of the field type definition that contains the field types to index.Value must be one of the following:boolean - set to true to recursively index all indexable field types or set to false to not dynamically index any of the dynamically indexable field types. For the list of field types that MongoDB Search dynamically indexes using the default type set, see Enable Default typeSet.object - specify the name typeSets that contains the list of field types to index. To learn more, see dynamic.typeSet.If you set this to false, you must specify individual fields to index using fields object. You can also configure individual fields to index separately using the fields object.IMPORTANT: MongoDB Search automatically indexes all dynamically indexable field types in a document. MongoDB Search also recursively indexes all nested documents under the document, unless you explicitly override by setting dynamic to false. You can also configure dynamic indexing to only index specified field types using typeSets. | false   |
| dynamic.typeSet               | string            | Optional  | Name of the typeSet array of objects that configures the field types to index. To learn more, see Configure a typeSet.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |         |
| fields                        | document          | Optional  | Document that maps field names to field definitions. To learn more, see an example. This is required if dynamic is omitted or set to false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |         |
| typeSets                      | array of objects  | Optional  | Field types to index automatically using dynamic mappings. To learn about the field types that you can configure for dynamic mappings, see Configure a typeSet.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |         |
| typeSets.\[n].name            | string            | Required  | Human-readable label that identifies the configuration for the fields types to dynamically index.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |         |
| typeSets.\[n].types           | array of objects  | Required  | Field types, one per object, to index automatically using dynamic mappings.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |         |
| typeSets.\[n].types.\[n].type | string            | Required  | Field type to automatically index. You can also configure the settings for each field type. If you don't configure any settings, MongoDB Search uses the default values for the field type. To learn more about the field types that you can configure for dynamic mapping, see Configure a typeSet.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |         |

sections.heading: Index Dynamically Using Default typeSet
sections.body:
The following index definition for the `sample_mflix.movies` collection
indexes the `awards` field as the `document` type. It also configures
MongoDB Search to automatically index all the dynamically indexable fields inside the
`awards` object.

```python
from pymongo import MongoClient
from pymongo.operations import SearchIndexModel

# Connect to your Atlas deployment
uri = "<connection-string>"
client = MongoClient(uri)

database = client["sample_mflix"]
collection = database["movies"]

# Create the MongoDB Search index definition for the document field
search_index_model = SearchIndexModel(
    definition={
        "mappings": {
            "dynamic": false,
            "fields": {
                "awards": {
                   "type": "document",
                   "dynamic": true
                }
            }
        },
    },
    name="default",
)

# Create the index
result = collection.create_search_index(model=search_index_model)
print(f"New index name: {result}")
```
